subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Beloved, my Lord, my Support and my Hope! I bear witness that Thou hast ever been One, Single, Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و محبوبی و سیدی و سندی و رجائی اشهد انک لم تزل کنت واحدا احدا صمدا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @servitude; submission to God; repentance
